ships.ability_description: Releases a massive, short-range radial blast that incinerates projectiles and deals heavy damage to nearby enemies.
Ship becomes semi-transparent and invulnerable for 2 seconds, leaving a trail of corrosive acid clouds.
ships.playstyle: High-mobility hit-and-run; ideal for bullet-hell navigation.

ships.aesthetic: Sharp angles, dual-cockpit look with lime accents
ships.ability_description: Fires synchronized lightning arcs from wing-prongs that chain between multiple enemies.
ships.playstyle: Crowd control; effective for clearing groups of smaller minions.

ships.aesthetic: Cold blue and silver, three-pronged skeletal frame
ships.ability_description: A high-velocity piercing railgun shot that pins enemies together and explodes into shards on kill.
ships.playstyle: High-precision sniping; slow fire rate with devastating boss damage.

ships.aesthetic: Compact, rounded, red and white defensive shell
ships.ability_description: Deploys a curved energy shield that reflects projectiles back at enemies with double velocity.
ships.playstyle: Defensive counter-play; turns enemy firepower against them.

ships.aesthetic: Magenta highlights with a needle-like nose
ships.ability_description: Releases tracking micro-drones that latch onto targets to drain health and recharge weapon energy.
ships.playstyle: Resource management; a 'leech' ship that thrives in sustained combat.
